facility_terms.governing_law: English and Welsh law, ADGM courts
facility_terms.interest_rate_description: Zero — true Qard Al Hassan (benevolent/interest-free loan)

covenants.name: Financier Liquidity
covenants.section_ref: Clause 6.2(e), page 7 — Financier must maintain sufficient liquidity to make advances when required

events_of_default.trigger: Non-payment by Borrower of any sum when due
Failure to comply with any other provision, not cured within 15 Business Days
Insolvency Event with respect to the Borrower
Cross-acceleration: Financial Indebtedness under MMA declared due early

risk_flags.description: All Financier enforcement rights (acceleration, legal proceedings, insolvency petitions) require prior written consent of the Investment Agent until Senior Discharge Date. EoD provisions are effectively toothless while senior facility is outstanding.
risk_flags.recommendation: No action needed — this subordination is protective of the senior facility (ACP's position)

risk_flags.description: Non-petition clause: Financier cannot institute winding up or enforce judgments until 2 years and 1 day after Senior Discharge Date
risk_flags.recommendation: Standard SPV bankruptcy-remoteness protection — beneficial to senior lender

definitions.Required Funded Amount: 15% of Total Commitments under the Master Murabaha Agreement = AED 8,263,125
definitions.Facility: AED 8,263,125 committed, unsecured, subordinated, interest-free advance facility
definitions.Senior Obligations: All obligations under the MMA and other Finance Documents
definitions.Senior Discharge Date: Date when all Senior Obligations irrevocably and unconditionally paid in full
definitions.Maturity Date: One Business Day after the Senior Discharge Date
definitions.Available Funds: Borrower assets legally available after payment of all Senior Obligations
